rationale: Audience overlap is strong — jigsaw "satisfaction" hooks index well with the same 25-55 female casual puzzle demo Marble Sort targets. However, mechanic match is the dealbreaker: drag-to-place jigsaw assembly misrepresents the tap-release/timing/physics-drop core loop, which risks high IPM but poor D1/D7 retention from mismatched installers. Palette is also off (cool blue/green/grey vs. the game's lavender + orange); if adapting, swap to a tap-to-drop marble sorting hook with the lilac palette and keep only the ASMR-style satisfaction framing.
